# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: log-agent-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: log-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: log-agent
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: log-agent
        image: <your_log_agent_image>
        volumeMounts:
          - mountPath: /var/log
            name: host-logs
          - mountPath: /var/lib/docker
            name: docker-data
      volumes:
        - name: host-logs
          hostPath:
            path: /var/log
        - name: docker-data
          hostPath:
            path: /var/lib/docker
